FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Signals Bullish Momentum on Yield Surge and Fed Hawkish Bias
tldr_points: MA20 support aligns with bullish bias

FX.comment: USD/JPY eyes upside as Treasury yields hit 5.05%, Fed stays hawkish, while MA20 offers technical support in near termly.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Tech Boost and China Visit Lift Intraday Highs
tldr_points: S&P 500 tests intraday highs amid tech sector strength.
Trump’s China visit adds optimism to trade‑related stocks.
RSI approaching overbought warns of near‑term pullback risk.
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 gains on tech boost and Trump‑China trade hopes probing 5,300 resistance as RSI climbs into overbought territory
STOCKS.comment: Bullish momentum with technical support near MA20.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Fed Chair Confirmation Fuels Risk Appetite, On‑Chain Liquidity Rises
tldr_points: Senate confirmation of Warsh signals accommodative monetary policy
Hyperliquid fee surge reflects strengthening on‑chain liquidity
Technical framework points to bullish bias above recent swing high
CRYPTO.excerpt: Fed chair pick, on‑chain fee growth, and bullish technicals combine for a near‑term BTC upside thesis.
CRYPTO.comment: Dovish Fed policy and strengthening on‑chain liquidity create a bullish trade setup.
